description: Analyze the SMTP capture file (smtp.pcap) to identify the Client IP (sending HELO/EHLO) and Server IP (sending 220 greeting). Export the first 20 packets to /home/ga/Documents/captures/smtp_resolved.txt as a plain text file. The output must use name resolution to map the Client IP to 'Infected_Client' and the Server IP to 'Corporate_Mail_Server', ensuring the exported packet summary lines display these resolved names instead of raw IP addresses.
